overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with long red hair walking through a rocky canyon environment. The scene transitions from a dark, misty enclosed canyon to a bright, open area with lush vegetation, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with cinematic golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark enclosed canyon with misty water pools

events.description: mist rises from water pools on the canyon floor as the character walks through
distant sky becomes visible ahead as the canyon begins to open up

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow misty canyon, long coat swaying with each step

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall rugged rock wall forming the right boundary of the canyon
rocky overhang forming a partial ceiling over the canyon path
shallow water on the canyon floor creating mist and reflections
patches of dry yellow-brown grass along the canyon edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dark, enclosed canyon with towering rock walls on both sides. Mist rises from water pools on the ground, and a rocky overhang blocks most of the sky above. The lighting is diffused and shadowy, with dry grass visible along the path edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition canyon opening to sky with increasing vegetation

events.description: exits the enclosed rocky overhang into a brighter, more open canyon section
vegetation transitions from dry yellow grass to green patches along the canyon floor

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the canyon widens, moving from shadow into mixed lighting

entered.detail: bright sky visible through the opening at the end of the canyon
right canyon wall illuminated by warm golden hour sunlight
fresh green grass appearing among the dry vegetation

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens up as the character moves forward, with sky becoming visible ahead. The rocky overhang and misty water are left behind as the walls recede to mid-distance. Sunlight begins to hit the right canyon wall, and green grass patches start appearing among the dry vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sunlit canyon with lush green vegetation

events.description: enters fully sunlit area with bright natural lighting and clear sky overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the wide sunlit canyon surrounded by tall green grass and rock walls

entered.detail: bright blue sky with scattered white clouds visible overhead
dense tall green grass covering the canyon floor and banks

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wide, open canyon bathed in warm golden hour sunlight. The canyon walls now stand far to the sides, revealing a broad expanse of blue sky with clouds overhead. Lush green grass covers the ground, replacing the sparse dry vegetation of the darker canyon sections.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, enclosed canyon that gradually opens into a wide, sun-drenched valley. It begins with the character walking between towering rock walls under a heavy overhang, where diffused shadows fall over misty water pools and dry grass. As the character moves forward, the rocky ceiling recedes to reveal the sky ahead, and the lighting shifts as sunlight first strikes the right canyon wall and green patches emerge among the vegetation. The scene then expands into a broad expanse where the walls stand far to the sides, replacing the oppressive enclosure with a wide blue sky and clouds. Finally, the environment transforms completely into a lush landscape of vibrant green grass bathed in the warm glow of golden hour sunlight.
